Projects

2022

  • Logistic Regression Class Implementation
    Implementation of Logistic Regression using Gradient Descent and Python.

  • OLS and Ridge Regression Class Implementations
    Implementations of OLS and ridge regression classes using Python with 1993 Auto MPG dataset visualization examples.

  • Standard Score
    Computing the Standard Score, commonly known as the Z-score, using C.

  • Pearson’s Chi-squared Test
    Pearson’s Chi-squared Test written in C with 2016 ANES survey data example.

  • Student’s T-Test
    One Sample and Two Samples Student’s T-Test implementations written utilizing C and R with examples using 2021 GSS survey data.

2021

  • Naive Bayesian Classifier Algorithm
    Naive bayesian classification algorithm (Categorical and Gaussian) with implementations written in C++; implementation examples visualized using Python scripting.

  • K-nearest-neighbors Classifier Algorithm
    K-nearest-neighbors classification algorithm (utilizing k-fold cross-validation) with accompanying C++ code; implementation example visualized using Python scripting.

© Nathan Englehart 08/09/22.
